questions.question: What is the purpose of the 'reduction' clause in OpenMP, and how is it different from the reduction clause in Fortran?
questions.hint: Explain the difference and provide an example

questions.question: A loop with 1000 iterations is parallelized using OpenMP with the 'parallel' directive. If there are 4 threads executing the loop, how many iterations will each thread execute?
questions.hint: Use the formula for loop carried dependency

questions.question: A producer thread writes a value to a shared cache, while a consumer thread reads the same value from the cache. If the producer thread writes a new value before the consumer thread finishes reading the previous value, what is the result?
